## Privacy Check

- [ ] No raw personal media committed.
- [ ] No generated videos, PDFs, or albums committed.
- [ ] No runtime caches committed.
- [ ] No private paths, tokens, or personal metadata added to docs/tests.

## Prompt/Docs Check

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Phase prompt updated if scoring/selection behavior changed.
- [ ] Config sample updated if new keys were added.
